title: Approve PROP-046 with operator decisions on 3 Q-OP questions. Author PROP-046-amendment-001-implementation with concrete prompt patches reflecting these decisions. Operator + cowork-claude apply.
scope_authority: Author PROP-046-amendment-001-implementation (concrete patch set, no design changes — just turn the PROP-046 design into deployable old_string/new_string diffs reflecting the 3 operator decisions below). Tinker does NOT self-apply.

Q1_field_name.rationale: Matches existing tinker.md dispatcher vocabulary (operator-directives have `target_mode` for routing). Using the same field name across attention-inbox and operator-directive consumers avoids two parallel routing conventions. `recommended_lane` and `recommended_recipient` would be new vocabulary requiring documentation in DATA-SCHEMAS.md; `target_mode` is already established.

Q2_prop029_orphan_lane.rationale: Don't pre-commit to a tinker sub-mode. Tinker's dispatcher already has Mode 1/2/3/4 selection logic — let it decide based on directive content. If PROP029-ORPHAN items grow to a class large enough to warrant a dedicated sub-mode, file a separate PROP. Current N=137-orphan-batch is a one-time spike, not a recurring pattern.

Q3_keep_resolved_false.rationale: Additive change is safer than schema change. Some downstream readers may rely on the field being present (analyst's Mode 2b filter logic uses `i.status==='pending' || (!i.resolved && i.status!=='resolved')` — the resolved field is in the second clause). Dropping it could create silent classification gaps. The new `status:'pending'` is the dominant signal; resolved:false stays as a redundant-but-safe field.

operator_preferences_for_amendment: Single comprehensive amendment, not multiple round trips
Every prompt edit given as exact old_string/new_string pair (PROP-014-amendment-001 format)
Regression check section mandatory: confirm both writer sites produce valid attention-inbox JSON post-patch (analyst Mode 2b dispatcher reads cleanly)
Operator + cowork-claude apply in single session after amendment authored

tasks_for_tinker.description: Author PROP-046-amendment-001-implementation.json with concrete patches for BOTH writer sites: (a) monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md Step 1a (STALE-ASSESS writer, current line ~250-253), (b) monitor/prompts/reference/analyst-mode1-expansions.md (PROP029-ORPHAN-DETECTED writer). Each patch as old_string/new_string. Apply the Q1 (target_mode) + Q2 (bare tinker for ORPHAN, analyst-mode-1b for STALE-ASSESS) + Q3 (keep resolved:false) decisions verbatim.

Walk the amendment for: (a) does it disrupt analyst Mode 2b dispatcher's current filter logic? (b) does it conflict with any other inbox writer's schema? (c) confirm the existing 6 STALE-ASSESS items (already operator-direct-fixed in commit 3688bbe with schema_fix_at field) won't be re-touched.

in_scope_for_tinker: Apply the 3 operator decisions verbatim — operator has decided, no additional design questions
out_of_scope_for_tinker: Do NOT self-apply any prompt edit. Amendment-only.
Do NOT raise additional design questions. The 3 Q-OPs are decided.
Do NOT expand scope to other inbox writers beyond the two named sites (PROP-046 explicitly scoped to those two).
deadline_target: Next tinker scheduled run (daily 03:30Z) or operator manual trigger.
